visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium close-up of a young male with brown hair, wearing a yellow crew-neck t-shirt and professional black headphones with a visible logo. He is standing in front of a silver condenser microphone with a mesh pop filter. He sings with high emotional intensity, frequently squinting his eyes and opening his mouth wide to hit certain notes. His right hand is visible, making small, expressive gestures in the air to accompany the melody. The background is a simple, light-blue pleated curtain, providing a clean studio aesthetic. The lighting is bright and even, likely from a studio source. (2) As the song progresses, the man continues his performance in the same setting. He maintains his emotional delivery, with his facial expressions reflecting the sentimental nature of the lyrics. He occasionally looks slightly away from the microphone as he breathes. His hands are more active in this phase, sometimes palms up or fingers curled as if grasping the emotion of the song. The lighting remains constant, and the camera stays static, focusing on his upper body and head. Small subtitles in Traditional Chinese appear at the bottom center of the frame. (3) In the final section, the performer reaches the climax of the song. His vocal delivery becomes more powerful, indicated by his wider mouth movements and increased bodily tension. He tilts his head slightly back while holding a long note. The condenser microphone remains stationary in the foreground. The light blue curtain behind him stays static, and no other people or objects enter the frame. The video concludes with him finishing the phrase and relaxing his posture slightly as the screen fades out.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 愛 只有簡單筆畫. [Logo]: SONY. (2) [Subtitle]: 卻比想像複雜. (3) [Subtitle]: 很安定愛變化. (4) [Subtitle]: 我愛過幾個人. (5) [Subtitle]: 也被愛過幾遍. (6) [Subtitle]: 卻還是沒能將幸福留下. (7) [Subtitle]: 愛 是不可數的嗎. (8) [Subtitle]: 為何我還相信. (9) [Subtitle]: 他不是獨行俠. (10) [Subtitle]: 我在等一個人. (11) [Subtitle]: 在等我的永恆. (12) [Subtitle]: 告訴我愛不單行別害怕.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a clean, professional studio recording of a male singer performing a pop ballad. The vocal is centrally mixed with a noticeable amount of hall reverb to add depth. The singer's speech rate is moderate, matching the slow tempo of the accompaniment. His pitch is mid-range but exhibits high variability as he navigates the melody. A soft, acoustic piano bed provides the harmonic foundation, playing resonant chords in a major key. The ambient noise floor is extremely low, suggesting a treated studio environment. (2) The vocal intensity increases in this phase as the singer moves into a higher register. His articulation remains crisp and clear, typical of professional broadcasting quality. The piano continues with a slightly more rhythmic pattern, and subtle orchestral strings begin to swell in the background, increasing the spectral bandwidth and emotional weight. There are no sudden SFX or noises, maintaining a focus on the musical performance. The interplay between the rising vocal volume and the thickening musical texture creates a sense of progression. (3) The performance reaches a peak with the singer delivering high-arousal, powerful notes. His voice shows no signs of technical distortion, indicating high-quality mastering. The music reaches its fullest arrangement with piano, strings, and a light percussion element. The singer uses expressive pauses (breath intake) which are left in the mix for intimacy. The track maintains a high signal-to-noise ratio throughout. The song ends with a sustained vocal note that slowly decays into the studio silence.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a professional singing performance of a sentimental pop song, emphasizing vocal skill and emotional delivery in a studio setting.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Sony headphones are visible but appear as standard professional gear rather than a paid placement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is a high-quality studio cover or original song performance, likely for social media promotion. The focus is entirely on the artist's technique and emotional connection.
